title: Market Commentary
summary:
Main
By Eirini Diamantara & Dimitris Roumeliotis
The first half of January reminded everyone that crude tankers do not need a fresh demand miracle to re-rate, they just need the map to change. Baltic Exchange TCEs captured that shift almost day by day. VLCC earnings slid from USD 62,929/day on 24 Dec to a low of USD 37,869/day by 6 Jan, before turning sharply higher to USD 97,323/day on 15 Jan, a 157% rebound from the early-month trough.
